# Abect Developer Tools

> Free browser-based developer tools. All processing happens locally — no uploads, no server, 100% private.

## Available Tools

- [WebP Converter](https://devtools.abect.com/webp-converter): Convert JPG, PNG, GIF, AVIF, BMP and TIFF images to WebP format. Supports batch conversion, adjustable quality, and ZIP download.
- [Favicon Generator](https://devtools.abect.com/favicon-generator): Generate favicon files from text, emoji, or an uploaded image. Exports PNG set (16, 32, 180, 192, 512 px) and favicon.ico.

### Image Converter — format conversion (20 tools)

- [PNG to JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/png-to-jpg): Convert PNG images to JPG online, free, in browser.
- [JPG to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/jpg-to-png): Convert JPG images to PNG online, lossless output.
- [WebP to JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/webp-to-jpg): Convert WebP images to JPG for universal compatibility.
- [WebP to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/webp-to-png): Convert WebP to PNG, preserves transparency.
- [PNG to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/png-to-webp): Convert PNG to WebP, up to 26% smaller files.
- [JPG to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/jpg-to-webp): Convert JPG to WebP, 25–34% smaller files.
- [JPEG to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/jpeg-to-png): Convert JPEG images to PNG, lossless output.
- [JPEG to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/jpeg-to-webp): Convert JPEG to WebP for smaller web images.
- [GIF to JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/gif-to-jpg): Convert GIF to JPG, first frame exported.
- [GIF to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/gif-to-png): Convert GIF to PNG, preserves transparency.
- [GIF to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/gif-to-webp): Convert GIF to WebP, smaller file size.
- [BMP to JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/bmp-to-jpg): Convert BMP to JPG, dramatically reduce file size.
- [BMP to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/bmp-to-png): Convert BMP to PNG, lossless compression.
- [BMP to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/bmp-to-webp): Convert BMP to WebP, 95%+ smaller files.
- [AVIF to JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/avif-to-jpg): Convert AVIF to JPG for universal compatibility.
- [AVIF to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/avif-to-png): Convert AVIF to PNG, preserves transparency.
- [AVIF to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/avif-to-webp): Convert AVIF to WebP for better tool support.
- [TIFF to JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/tiff-to-jpg): Convert TIFF to JPG, make images web-ready.
- [TIFF to PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/tiff-to-png): Convert TIFF to PNG, lossless, smaller files.
- [TIFF to WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/tiff-to-webp): Convert TIFF to WebP for modern web delivery.

### Image Compressor — reduce file size (3 tools)

- [Compress JPG](https://devtools.abect.com/compress-jpg): Compress JPEG images online. Adjustable per-file quality slider, batch compression, live fullscreen preview of result, ZIP download. No uploads.
- [Compress PNG](https://devtools.abect.com/compress-png): Lossless PNG compression in browser. Strips metadata to reduce file size. Live preview of compressed result, batch processing, ZIP download.
- [Compress WebP](https://devtools.abect.com/compress-webp): Compress WebP images with adjustable quality. Typically 50–80% size reduction. Live fullscreen preview, batch compression, ZIP download. No uploads.

## SEO & Schema Tools

- [Meta Tag Generator](https://devtools.abect.com/meta-tags-generator): Generate SEO meta tags — title, description, canonical, robots, hreflang, and Open Graph. Live Google search preview. Copy-ready HTML output.

## Coming Soon

Image tools: OG image generator, SVG to JSX converter.
Converters: HTML to JSX, CSS to Tailwind, JSON to TypeScript types, JSON to Zod schema, JSON to Mongoose schema, Markdown to HTML, YAML to JSON, CSV to JSON.
SEO tools: JSON-LD generator, OG preview, sitemap generator, hreflang builder.
Utilities: JSON formatter, JWT decoder, regex tester, Base64 encoder/decoder, cron builder, color converter, UUID generator, diff viewer.

## About

Built by Abect. All tools run entirely in the browser — files are never uploaded to any server.

- Site: https://devtools.abect.com
- Privacy Policy: https://devtools.abect.com/privacy-policy
